DataSource.SQL: SELECT fot.ParentFolderTreeID ,fot.ID AS CurrentFolderTreeID ,ISNULL(itsCat.SegmentTypeID, 'ITSMRequest') AS SegmentTypeID FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot LEFT JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMCategory AS itsCat ON itsCat.ID = fol.TableID AND fol.FormIdent = 'ITSMCategory' WHERE fot.ID = @FolderTreeID

SELECT fotP.Ident AS [Value] ,CASE fotP.[Level] WHEN 1 THEN 'ITSMCompanyIdent' WHEN 2 THEN 'ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident' WHEN 3 THEN 'ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident' WHEN 4 THEN 'ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident' WHEN 5 THEN 'ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident' END AS ControlIdent FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fot.Ident LIKE fotP.Ident + '%' WHERE fot.ID = @FolderTreeID

SELECT fotP.ID AS FolderTreeID, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fot.Ident LIKE fotP.Ident + '%' INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fotP.FolderID AND fol.[State] = @FolderActiveState WHERE fot.ID = @FolderTreeID ORDER BY fotP.Level ASC

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
SELECT itsGaftbaap.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsGaftbaap.FolderTreeID AS FolderTreeID ,itsGaftbaap.FolderName AS [Name] ,NULL AS ParentFolderTreeID ,1 AS [Level]
,itsCom.IconCssClass ,itsCom.ColorCssClass ,'' AS [Description] ,itsKnbAgg.[RowCount] AS ITSMKnowledgeBaseCount ,ISNULL(itsGaftbaapCAgg.[RowCount], 0) AS ChildrenFolderTreeCount FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(@UserID, @FolderGroupSegmentIdent, @PermissionIDs) AS itsGaftbaap INNER JOIN usr.ITSMCompany AS itsCom ON itsCom.ID = itsGaftbaap.TableID AND itsCom.[State] != @DeletedState OUTER APPLY ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT itsKnbSetting.ID) AS [RowCount] FROM usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseCommonFolderSubForm AS itsKbcfsf INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting ON itsKnbSetting.ID = itsKbcfsf.TableID AND itsKnbSetting.[State] != @DeletedState WHERE itsKbcfsf.CommonFolderTreeIdent LIKE itsGaftbaap.FolderTreeIdent + '%' AND itsKbcfsf.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsKbcfsf.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting' ) AS itsKnbAgg OUTER APPLY ( SELECT COUNT(itsGaftbaapC.FolderTreeID) AS [RowCount] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(@UserID, @FolderGroupSegmentIdent, @PermissionIDs) AS itsGaftbaapC WHERE itsGaftbaapC.ParentFolderTreeID = itsGaftbaap.FolderTreeID AND itsGaftbaapC.FolderState = @FolderActiveState ) AS itsGaftbaapCAgg WHERE itsGaftbaap.FormIdent = 'ITSMCompany' AND @FolderTreeID IS NULL AND itsGaftbaap.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION ALL
SELECT itsGaftbaap.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsGaftbaap.FolderTreeID AS FolderTreeID ,itsGaftbaap.FolderName AS [Name] ,itsGaftbaap.ParentFolderTreeID ,itsGaftbaap.FolderLevel AS [Level]
,itsCat.IconCssClass ,itsCat.ColorCssClass ,'' AS [Description] ,itsKnbAgg.[RowCount] AS ITSMKnowledgeBaseCount ,ISNULL(itsGaftbaapCAgg.[RowCount], 0) AS ChildrenFolderTreeCount FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(@UserID, @FolderGroupSegmentIdent, @PermissionIDs) AS itsGaftbaap INNER JOIN usr.ITSMCategory AS itsCat ON itsCat.ID = itsGaftbaap.TableID AND itsCat.[State] != @DeletedState OUTER APPLY ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT itsKnbSetting.ID) AS [RowCount] FROM usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseCommonFolderSubForm AS itsKbcfsf INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting ON itsKnbSetting.ID = itsKbcfsf.TableID AND itsKnbSetting.[State] != @DeletedState WHERE itsKbcfsf.CommonFolderTreeIdent LIKE itsGaftbaap.FolderTreeIdent + '%' AND itsKbcfsf.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsKbcfsf.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting' ) AS itsKnbAgg OUTER APPLY ( SELECT COUNT(itsGaftbaapC.FolderTreeID) AS [RowCount] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(@UserID, @FolderGroupSegmentIdent, @PermissionIDs) AS itsGaftbaapC WHERE itsGaftbaapC.ParentFolderTreeID = itsGaftbaap.FolderTreeID AND itsGaftbaapC.FolderState = @FolderActiveState ) AS itsGaftbaapCAgg WHERE itsGaftbaap.FormIdent = 'ITSMCategory' AND itsGaftbaap.ParentFolderTreeID = @FolderTreeID AND @FolderTreeID IS NOT NULL AND itsGaftbaap.FolderState = @FolderActiveState

SELECT itsKnbSetting.ID ,CONCAT(itsKbt.TextValue + ' - ' ,itsKnb.Title) AS Title ,FORMAT(itsKnb.CreateDate, 'dd.MM.yyyy', @UICultureCode) AS CreateDate ,creatorAcc.FullName AS AccountID ,ISNULL(itsKbtSetting.IconCssClass, 'ph-file') AS IconCssClass ,ISNULL(itsKbtSetting.ColorCssClass, 'primary') AS ColorCssClass ,fot.ID AS FolderTreeID FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseCommonFolderSubForm AS itsKbcfsf ON itsKbcfsf.CommonFolderTreeIdent = fot.Ident AND itsKbcfsf.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsKbcfsf.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting' INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting ON itsKnbSetting.ID = itsKbcfsf.TableID AND itsKnbSetting.[State] != @DeletedState INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBase AS itsKnb ON itsKnb.Guid = itsKnbSetting.Guid AND itsKnb.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeSetting AS itsKbtSetting ON itsKbtSetting.Guid = itsKnbSetting.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeGuid LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseType AS itsKbt ON itsKbt.Guid = itsKbtSetting.Guid AND itsKbt.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS creatorAcc ON creatorAcc.ID = itsKnb.AccountID WHERE fot.ID = @FolderTreeID ORDER BY itsKnb.CreateDate DESC

SELECT itsKnbSetting.ID ,CONCAT(itsKbt.TextValue + ' - ' ,itsKnb.Title) AS Title ,FORMAT(itsKnb.CreateDate, 'dd.MM.yyyy', @UICultureCode) AS CreateDate ,creatorAcc.FullName AS AccountID ,ISNULL(itsKbtSetting.IconCssClass, 'ph-file') AS IconCssClass ,ISNULL(itsKbtSetting.ColorCssClass, 'primary') AS ColorCssClass ,@FolderTreeIdent FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseCommonFolderSubForm AS itsKbcfsf ON itsKbcfsf.CommonFolderTreeIdent = fot.Ident AND itsKbcfsf.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsKbcfsf.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting' INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting ON itsKnbSetting.ID = itsKbcfsf.TableID AND itsKnbSetting.[State] != @DeletedState INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBase AS itsKnb ON itsKnb.Guid = itsKnbSetting.Guid AND itsKnb.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeSetting AS itsKbtSetting ON itsKbtSetting.Guid = itsKnbSetting.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeGuid LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseType AS itsKbt ON itsKbt.Guid = itsKbtSetting.Guid AND itsKbt.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS creatorAcc ON creatorAcc.ID = itsKnb.AccountID WHERE fot.Ident = @FolderTreeIdent ORDER BY itsKnb.CreateDate DESC

SELECT itsKnbSetting.ID ,CONCAT(itsKbt.TextValue + ' - ' ,itsKnb.Title) AS Title ,FORMAT(itsKnb.CreateDate, 'dd.MM.yyyy', @UICultureCode) AS CreateDate ,creatorAcc.FullName AS AccountID ,ISNULL(itsKbtSetting.IconCssClass, 'ph-file') AS IconCssClass ,ISNULL(itsKbtSetting.ColorCssClass, 'primary') AS ColorCssClass ,@FolderTreeIdent FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseCommonFolderSubForm AS itsKbcfsf ON itsKbcfsf.CommonFolderTreeIdent = fot.Ident AND itsKbcfsf.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsKbcfsf.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting' INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting ON itsKnbSetting.ID = itsKbcfsf.TableID AND itsKnbSetting.[State] != @DeletedState INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBase AS itsKnb ON itsKnb.Guid = itsKnbSetting.Guid AND itsKnb.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeSetting AS itsKbtSetting ON itsKbtSetting.Guid = itsKnbSetting.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeGuid LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseType AS itsKbt ON itsKbt.Guid = itsKbtSetting.Guid AND itsKbt.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS creatorAcc ON creatorAcc.ID = itsKnb.AccountID WHERE fot.Ident = @FolderTreeIdent ORDER BY itsKnb.CreateDate DESC

IF @ShowInLanguageID IS NOT NULL BEGIN SELECT lan.ID AS [Value] ,lan.[Name] AS Title ,IIF(lan.ID = @ShowInLanguageID, 1, 0) AS Selected FROM dbo.Language AS lan END ELSE BEGIN SELECT lan.ID AS [Value] ,lan.[Name] AS Title ,IIF(lan.ID = @UserLanguageID, 1, 0) AS Selected FROM dbo.Language AS lan END

SELECT itsKnb.Title ,itsKnb.Content ,itsLabAgg.TextValues AS ITSMLabelIDs ,itsKbt.TextValue AS ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeGuid ,creatorAcc.[FullName] AS AccountID ,FORMAT(itsKnbSetting.[CreateDate], 'dd. MM. yyyy', @UICultureCode) AS CreateDate ,lastUpdateAcc.[FullName] AS LastUpdateAccountID ,FORMAT(itsKnbSetting.[LastUpdate], 'dd. MM. yyyy', @UICultureCode) AS UpdateDate FROM usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBase AS itsKnb ON itsKnb.Guid = itsKnbSetting.Guid AND itsKnb.LanguageID = ISNULL(@ShowInLanguageID, @UserLanguageID) INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseType AS itsKbt ON itsKbt.Guid = itsKnbSetting.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeGuid AND itsKbt.LanguageID = ISNULL(@ShowInLanguageID, @UserLanguageID) OUTER APPLY ( SELECT STRING_AGG(itsLab.TextValue, ', ') AS TextValues FROM dbo.MultiSelect AS mus INNER JOIN usr.ITSMLabel AS itsLab ON itsLab.ID = TRY_CAST(mus.[Value] AS INT) WHERE mus.TableID = itsKnbSetting.ID AND mus.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting' AND mus.ControlIdent = 'ITSMLabelIDs' ) AS itsLabAgg LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS creatorAcc ON creatorAcc.ID = itsKnbSetting.AccountID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS lastUpdateAcc ON lastUpdateAcc.ID = itsKnbSetting.LastUpdateAccountID WHERE itsKnbSetting.[ID] = @ITSMKnowledgeBaseID

SELECT fil.ID ,fil.TableID ,fil.FormIdent ,fil.[Name] ,fil.[Extension] ,fil.[DataGuid] ,fil.[Size] ,CASE UPPER(fil.[Extension]) WHEN 'CSS' THEN 'ph-file-css' WHEN 'CSV' THEN 'ph-file-csv'
WHEN 'DOC' THEN 'ph-file-doc' WHEN 'DOCX' THEN 'ph-file-doc'
WHEN 'HTML' THEN 'ph-file-html'
WHEN 'APNG' THEN 'ph-file-image' WHEN 'PNG' THEN 'ph-file-image' WHEN 'AVIF' THEN 'ph-file-image' WHEN 'GIF' THEN 'ph-file-image' WHEN 'JPEG' THEN 'ph-file-jpg' WHEN 'JPG' THEN 'ph-file-jpg' WHEN 'JFIF' THEN 'ph-file-jpg' WHEN 'PJPEG' THEN 'ph-file-jpg' WHEN 'PJP' THEN 'ph-file-jpg' WHEN 'PNG' THEN 'ph-file-png' WHEN 'WEBP' THEN 'ph-file-image'
WHEN 'PDF' THEN 'ph-file-pdf'
WHEN 'PPT' THEN 'ph-file-ppt' WHEN 'RS' THEN 'ph-file-rs' WHEN 'TS' THEN 'ph-file-ts' WHEN 'TSX' THEN 'ph-file-tsx' WHEN 'VUE' THEN 'ph-file-vue'
WHEN 'XLS' THEN 'ph-file-xls' WHEN 'XLSX' THEN 'ph-file-xls'
WHEN 'ZIP' THEN 'ph-file-zip'
WHEN 'MP3' THEN 'ph-file-audio' WHEN 'OGG' THEN 'ph-file-audio' WHEN 'WAV' THEN 'ph-file-audio'
WHEN 'MP4' THEN 'ph-file-video' WHEN 'WEBM' THEN 'ph-file-video' WHEN 'AVI' THEN 'ph-file-video' WHEN 'FLV' THEN 'ph-file-video' WHEN 'MOV' THEN 'ph-file-video' WHEN 'WMV' THEN 'ph-file-video'
WHEN 'XML' THEN 'ph-file-text' WHEN 'MD' THEN 'ph-file-text' WHEN 'TXT' THEN 'ph-file-text' WHEN 'SQL' THEN 'ph-file-text'
ELSE 'ph-file' END AS [IconCssClass] ,CASE UPPER(fil.[Extension]) WHEN 'CSS' THEN '#214ce5' WHEN 'CSV' THEN '#088e32'
WHEN 'DOC' THEN '#325b9d' WHEN 'DOCX' THEN '#325b9d'
WHEN 'HTML' THEN '#e5532d'
WHEN 'APNG' THEN '#ff417b' WHEN 'PNG' THEN '#ff417b' WHEN 'AVIF' THEN '#bd2c61' WHEN 'GIF' THEN '#3e8bcb' WHEN 'JPEG' THEN '#ee7e86' WHEN 'JPG' THEN '#ee7e86' WHEN 'JFIF' THEN '#ee7e86' WHEN 'PJPEG' THEN '#ee7e86' WHEN 'PJP' THEN '#ee7e86' WHEN 'PNG' THEN '#ff417b' WHEN 'WEBP' THEN '#6cbc2b'
WHEN 'PDF' THEN '#b61308'
WHEN 'PPT' THEN '#d24a2b' WHEN 'RS' THEN '#080808' WHEN 'TS' THEN '#087670' WHEN 'TSX' THEN '#087670' WHEN 'VUE' THEN '#08bb7c'
WHEN 'XLS' THEN '#15763e' WHEN 'XLSX' THEN '#15763e'
WHEN 'ZIP' THEN '#febf08'
WHEN 'MP3' THEN '#6fb9ef' WHEN 'OGG' THEN '#1f7eb0' WHEN 'WAV' THEN '#c0257f'
WHEN 'MP4' THEN '#0a88c4' WHEN 'WEBM' THEN '#6dbc21' WHEN 'AVI' THEN '#3998d2' WHEN 'FLV' THEN '#af1209' WHEN 'MOV' THEN '#238dc2' WHEN 'WMV' THEN '#429ad0'
WHEN 'XML' THEN '#f4b400' WHEN 'MD' THEN '#f4b400' WHEN 'TXT' THEN '#f4b400' WHEN 'SQL' THEN '#f4b400'
ELSE '#000000' END AS [IconColor] ,CASE UPPER(fil.[Extension]) WHEN 'PNG' THEN 'Image' WHEN 'JPG' THEN 'Image' WHEN 'GIF' THEN 'Image' WHEN 'JPEG' THEN 'Image' WHEN 'BMP' THEN 'Image' WHEN 'PDF' THEN 'Pdf' WHEN 'XLS' THEN 'MSOffice' WHEN 'XLSX' THEN 'MSOffice' WHEN 'DOCX' THEN 'MSOffice' WHEN 'DOC' THEN 'MSOffice' WHEN 'PPT' THEN 'MSOffice' WHEN 'PPTX' THEN 'MSOffice' ELSE '' END AS FileType
/*FROM dbo.[File] AS fil*/ FROM usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting INNER JOIN dbo.[File] AS fil ON fil.TableID = itsKnbSetting.ID AND fil.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting' AND fil.ControlIdent = 'Attachments' AND fil.[State] = @FileActiveState INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseFileExtension AS itsKbfe ON itsKbfe.ID = fil.ID INNER JOIN dbo.MultiSelect AS mus ON mus.TableID = itsKbfe.ID AND mus.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseFileExtension' AND mus.ControlIdent = 'LanguageIDs' AND TRY_CAST(mus.[Value] AS INT) = ISNULL(@ShowInLanguageID, @UserLanguageID) WHERE itsKnbSetting.ID = @ITSMKnowledgeBaseID

SELECT itsKnbSetting.ID ,CONCAT(itsKbt.TextValue + ' - ' ,itsKnb.Title) AS Title ,FORMAT(itsKnb.CreateDate, 'dd.MM.yyyy', @UICultureCode) AS CreateDate ,creatorAcc.FullName AS AccountID ,ISNULL(itsKbtSetting.IconCssClass, 'ph-file') AS IconCssClass ,ISNULL(itsKbtSetting.ColorCssClass, 'primary') AS ColorCssClass ,@FolderTreeIdent FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseCommonFolderSubForm AS itsKbcfsf ON itsKbcfsf.CommonFolderTreeIdent = fot.Ident AND itsKbcfsf.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsKbcfsf.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting' INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting ON itsKnbSetting.ID = itsKbcfsf.TableID AND itsKnbSetting.[State] != @DeletedState INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBase AS itsKnb ON itsKnb.Guid = itsKnbSetting.Guid AND itsKnb.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeSetting AS itsKbtSetting ON itsKbtSetting.Guid = itsKnbSetting.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeGuid LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseType AS itsKbt ON itsKbt.Guid = itsKbtSetting.Guid AND itsKbt.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS creatorAcc ON creatorAcc.ID = itsKnb.AccountID WHERE fot.Ident = @FolderTreeIdent ORDER BY itsKnb.CreateDate DESC
